note: authority_level 1 = canonical SSOT; 5 = superseded legacy. Lower number wins in conflict.

entries.description: Canonical E2E process contract: 26 steps S01-S26, 10 phases PHASE_A-PHASE_J. Fully reconciled with process_step_catalog.json (2026-05-04): all module_ids updated to current canonical symbols (C1, S1, R1, O1, B1-B3, O2_OMS_STATE_MACHINE, E1-E4, F1), step names, contracts, dependencies, and phase module_sequences all match. Alignment validator: physical PASS / alignment PASS / readiness PASS / semantic_coverage 100%.
Canonical process step catalog: 26 steps with numeric IDs ^6\d{19}$, dependency_step_ids, entrypoint_files. Generated by generate_three_artifact_catalogs.py — do not edit manually.

Canonical module catalog: 27 modules with numeric IDs ^5\d{19}$. Enriched with microservice_port, ea_system, communication_channel_bindings, reentry_matrix_ref. Generated by generate_three_artifact_catalogs.py — new fields survive regeneration via seed-preservation.

Human-readable module map: 28 modules, port mappings, 14-phase MT4 bridge protocol, reentry matrix v3.0 priority rules, EA systems A-G. Unique data extracted into module_catalog.json and communication_channels.json. Do not add structured fields here.

6 MT4<->Python channels: HTTP REST port 5001, DDE, JSONL outbox, CSV polling, Redis pub/sub, TCP socket port 5555. Data contracts: PriceTick_v1, Signal_v1, OrderIntent_v1_2, ExecutionReport_v1. Mined into EA-REG/communication_channels.json.
118KB pre-modular HUEY_P tactical spec. Reentry matrix v1.0 rules and risk heuristics extracted into E1-E4 modules reentry_matrix_ref field in module_catalog.json.
Machine-readable catalog of all 6 MT4<->Python communication channels with ports, Redis topics, data contracts, owning module IDs, and associated files. New artifact created 2026-05-04.
Completion record for PH-00 through PH-07 identity migration. Validation gates extracted to VALIDATION_GATES.md. Keep as migration record.
Runnable validation gate commands G-00 through G-06 extracted from MIGRATION_COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md. Physical registry schema, .dir_id format, classification rules.
Auto-generated three-artifact alignment report. Regenerate by running validate_three_artifact_alignment.py from EA-REG/. Do not edit manually.
Inventory of 31 solution files and 250 .dir_id anchor files from identity migration. Generated 2026-03-19.
Symbol-to-numeric ID map: 27 modules (prefix 5*), 26 steps (prefix 6*), 2 aliases (O2_OMS -> O2_OMS_STATE_MACHINE, O3_PNL_CLASSIFIER -> O3_TRADE_CLOSE_CLASSIFIER).
Execution scaffold for identity migration: 8 phases PH-00 through PH-07, 7 validation gates, absorbed contracts. Authoritative per EA-REG/CLAUDE.md.
JSON Schema for module_catalog.json. Enforces ^5\d{19}$ on module_id. additionalProperties: true — new fields do not require schema changes.
Pre-migration Python file inventory. Superseded by file_registry.csv.
Early draft migration spec. Superseded by solution_spec.json.
